title: Create Slice and Dice: Growth Accelerator
description: Allows water and lava to speed up crop growth through a sprinkler head. Makes blaze cake automation better.
body:
"Create Slice and Dice" sprinklers now will accelerate the growth of crops underneath them. **Water** for normal crops and **lava** for netherwart. 

I have been designing a modpack and I wanted a more compact and efficient farm for blaze cakes so I decided to change the functionality of sprinklers to work similar to the watering cans from ExDeorum. 

Features:

**Water**: Speeds up crop growth beneath it, this includes crops like sugarcane, cactus and bamboo which are not effected by bone meal.

**Lava**: Speeds up netherwart growth on soul sand.
